title: EXPO-FT: Sample-Efficient Reinforcement Learning Finetuning for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: EXPO-FT is a method for stable, sample-efficient reinforcement-learning finetuning of pretrained Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies. Pretrained VLAs often fall short of deployment reliability, and prior RL either trains from scratch or finetunes VLAs without the sample efficiency real deployment needs. On precise, dynamic manipulation tasks, EXPO-FT reaches perfect task performance (30/30 successes) within an average of 19.1 minutes of online robot data, outperforming RL-from-scratch and prior VLA-finetuning baselines.
